sub_strands.sub_strand: Secondary Dominants and Pivot Chord Modulations
outcomes: Identify, resolve, and write secondary dominant chords within major and minor key structures on a grand staff
Compose short harmonic progressions that smoothly modulate to closely related keys using common pivot chords
Analyze pitch ranges, clef usage, and acoustic timbres for standard Western orchestral instruments
Transpose musical scores accurately for common transposing instruments including B-flat trumpets, clarinets, and F horns

sub_strands.sub_strand: Lighting Design, Stage Acoustics, and Set Architecture
outcomes: Draft comprehensive theatrical lighting plots mapping out fixtures, gels, circuit patches, and illumination angles
Design structural scale models of proscenium and thrust stages implementing specific set architectural designs
